nasb.text: And when Paul had laid his hands upon them, the Holy Spirit came on them, and they began speaking with tongues and prophesying.

esv.text: And when Paul had laid his hands on them, the Holy Spirit came on them, and they began speaking in tongues and prophesying.

cnv.text: 保羅為他們按手，聖靈就降在他們身上，他們就用各種的語言講話，並且說預言。

ccb.text: 保罗把手按在他们身上时，圣灵便降在他们身上，他们就说方言，讲上帝的信息。

csbs.text: 接着，保罗按手在他们身上，圣灵就临到了他们。他们就说起殊言，又说预言。
